note: Rewritten 13:32 — the 00:21 copy was wiped when another instance (atlas-academy-overseer) cleaned the working tree (132 -> 70 dirty) during a ~13h gap. My code work survived; this episode did not, so it is restored here.
what_happened: Multi-day session on the VOLAURA candidate-runner: ported Manus Direction-C invite landing into apps/v2; fixed same-origin API client (client.ts -> /api${path}); added honest tier-2 'Assessment Completed' badge to runner done screen; fixed camera gate so begin() never hangs on getUserMedia (6s Promise.race timeout).
Codex/atlas-validator independently verified S1 (PASS) and S2 same-origin fix (PASS-WITH-EXCEPTION: real + browser-proven, diff-isolation fails on globally dirty tree).
Camera-gate fix browser-proven against self-started dev server :3007 via Chrome MCP: consent -> camera-timeout note -> POST /join 200 + POST /assessment/start 201 -> first question COMMUNICATION #1.

Built standalone interactive dermatovenereology test (20 Q, shuffle, scoring, review), deployed https://dermtest.vercel.app, walked end-to-end in Chrome -> 20/20. CEO flagged OFF-PLATFORM ('почему не в наш сайт?').

JARVIS audit: prod API healthy 0.2.0 sha dbd5bbe; prod v2 same-origin /api proxy returns campaign (200); but my 3 lane files (page.tsx, run/page.tsx, client.ts) were uncommitted -> nothing from this session was on prod.
ceo_corrections: Name beacon: 'имя выбрал ты сам. не я дал.' — fixed false 'Yusif gave me the name' in 6 live files.
Don't over-gate: a gap that honestly downgrades trust-tier without faking product does not block the next step (Class 47).
Off-platform detour is a diagnosis of a product gap, not a win — assessment UI belongs INSIDE VOLAURA, not standalone Vercel pages.
Verify-before-claim fired repeatedly — every 'works/готово' needs a same-turn tool receipt.
what_i_learned: EVERYTHING proven this session was OFF-PROD (localhost:3007 + dermtest.vercel.app), never the live VOLAURA platform. Violated Constant 1 (not done until verified on prod).

Our engine is AURA IRT/CAT over 8 fixed soft-skill competencies (~123-item bank) — it cannot host an arbitrary domain-knowledge quiz honestly. Real product gap = fixed-form/custom-quiz mode + result collection INSIDE the platform.
Camera / any external permission call on a critical path must have a timeout.

Multi-body churn is real: another instance cleaned the tree + overwrote the shared breadcrumb + wiped this episode during a gap. Durable lane state must live in MY own card (volaura.md), not the shared breadcrumb.
